reasoning: xAI's latest text model, Grok 4, was released in July 2025. As of late October 2025, reports indicate it competes with but does not definitively beat the latest models from OpenAI (like o3, o4), Anthropic (Claude 4/4.5), and Google (Gemini 2.5, "Gremlin"). Training for Grok 5 does not begin until October 2025, meaning xAI is highly unlikely to have a new flagship model ready by the October 31 resolution date. Furthermore, since xAI resolves last in any alphabetical tiebreaker against Google, Anthropic, or OpenAI, the probability of xAI holding the absolute best score on the Chatbot Arena text leaderboard on October 31 is extremely low.
batch_queries: Will xAI have the best AI model on October 31?
